EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a customer at the sixth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: RN Expired
EmailTemplate.subject: Business insurance now expired
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your business insurance policy has now expired.
I’m sorry to see that you decided not to stay with Kingsbridge for another year.
However, it’s not too late to avoid a gap in cover. If you have changed your mind or did not mean to let your policy lapse, I can restart your policy within 30 days of your expiry date.
Please reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can always give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
If you don’t renew within this 30-day window and still wish to be covered by Kingsbridge, I’ll have to requote your insurance policy which may take more time and may result in a gap in your insurance coverage.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
